description_long: This is a round, heavy-duty manhole cover set within a square section of textured pavement. The cover features a complex radial and concentric grid pattern, with several raised bands and segments forming a geometric motif. Multiple inscriptions, including text and numbers, are visible along the outer rim, likely indicating manufacturer, standards, or identification codes. The surface is metallic, showing a dark bronze or iron coloration with some weathering and slight sheen. The surrounding pavement is rough and gray, contrasting with the smoother, patterned metal of the cover. No visible bolts or fasteners are present, and the cover appears to be designed for flush installation in urban streets or sidewalks.
description: A round, patterned metal manhole cover with inscriptions, set in rough gray pavement. The cover displays a geometric grid motif and weathered metallic finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full circular grid pattern, inscriptions, and the surrounding pavement.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thin profile of the cover and pavement, with minimal surface detail visible.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the depth of the cover and the raised grid pattern, with inscriptions partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite edge-on view, again emphasizing the thinness and layered structure of the cover and pavement.
attribute_pattern_design: Radial and concentric grid pattern with raised bands, geometric motifs, and multiple inscriptions around the rim.
